sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: TGLS SEC Filings - Tecnoglass Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission filings for Tecnoglass Inc. (NYSE: TGLS), a producer of high-end aluminum and vinyl windows and architectural glass. Investors can find 10-K annual reports, 10-Q quarterly earnings, 8-K material events, and insider trading forms. The platform also offers AI-powered summaries, impact scoring, and sentiment analysis for each filing to help users understand complex disclosures.

feed.title: Boston Scientific (BSX) Says CHAMPION-AF Trial Meets All Primary Endpoints
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) announced that its CHAMPION-AF clinical trial for the WATCHMAN FLX device met all primary and secondary safety and efficacy endpoints, demonstrating a significant reduction in non-procedural bleeding risk for patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation. This positive data led Goldman Sachs to reiterate a Buy rating, despite a lowered price target, while Evercore ISI added BSX to its "Tactical Outperform" list. The results were presented at the American College of Cardiology’s Annual Scientific Session and published in The New England Journal of Medicine.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Initiates Coverage on Ball (BALL) with 'Buy' Rating
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has initiated coverage on Ball Corporation (BALL) with a "Buy" rating and set a price target of $72.00 USD. This optimistic outlook comes despite recent analyst actions, where some maintained "Outperform" but slightly lowered price targets. The report highlights Ball's market dominance as the world's largest metal can manufacturer and its strategic focus on increasing capacity and investing in emerging markets.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock Confirms Updated Total Voting Rights and Share Capital
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock (SW) has announced its updated total voting rights and share capital as of March 31, 2026. The company's issued share capital consists of 524,457,866 ordinary shares with a nominal value of $0.001 each, and it holds no treasury shares. This disclosure provides clarity for shareholders regarding their regulatory obligations under U.K. transparency rules.

feed.title: Chipotle Mexican Grill Stock: Navigating Flat Comps Guidance and Expansion in a Challenging Consumer
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill faces investor caution due to flat same-store sales guidance for fiscal 2026, driven by softer traffic, despite continued robust unit growth and digital initiatives. The company plans to release its Q1 2026 earnings on April 29, which investors will closely watch for signs of traffic recovery, margin resilience, and the effectiveness of its strategic initiatives like Chipotlanes and digital promotions. While Chipotle exhibits strong brand power and operational efficiency, risks include prolonged consumer traffic declines and potential margin compression from rising costs, making Q1 earnings critical for its future stock performance.

feed.title: T-Mobile might buy Uniti Group's Kinetic fiber assets
feed.summary: T-Mobile is reportedly looking to acquire fiber assets from Uniti Group, potentially partnering with TPG for a larger acquisition. This move aligns with T-Mobile's strategy to expand its fiber holdings, especially after rival carriers have made similar acquisitions. Analysts anticipate significant consolidation in the U.S. fiber industry as wireless providers aim to bundle FTTH services with their wireless offerings.

feed.title: American Express to open a two-story lounge at Logan with a terrace and a view
feed.summary: American Express has announced plans to open a 20,000-square-foot, two-story Centurion Lounge at Logan International Airport's Terminal C in 2029. The lounge will feature an outdoor terrance with airfield views, local artwork, high-end food and beverages, and dedicated workspaces. American Express is committing approximately $391 million to the project, with Massport approving a $75 million budget for the lounge's shell.

feed.title: Vodafone GigaCube: Revolutionizing Mobile Broadband with Unlimited 5G Home Connectivity for North Am
feed.summary: Vodafone's GigaCube is a 5G mobile broadband solution offering high-speed, unlimited internet via a portable router, crucial for European home connectivity as 5G networks expand. It has become a key part of Vodafone's 5G home internet strategy, with over 500,000 active units in Germany alone, showcasing its role in bridging mobile and fixed network convergence. The service also offers North American investors indirect exposure to the European telecom rebound through Vodafone Group plc ADR, providing a stable dividend yield and debt reduction benefits.

feed.title: Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT) director granted 33 cash-settled phantom stock units
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. director David MacLennan was granted 33 cash-settled phantom stock units, valued at $690.44 each, bringing his total to 453 units. These units are part of Caterpillar's Director's Deferred Compensation Plan and are the economic equivalent of common stock, settling in cash upon his retirement or separation. This transaction was not an open-market purchase, and the filing was made via SEC Form 4.

feed.title: A surgeon and Intuitive exec explain what da Vinci 5's 10,000x computing leap actually looks like, inside and outside the OR
feed.summary: The da Vinci 5, Intuitive's latest surgical system, offers a 10,000x computing power increase over its predecessor, enabling new capabilities like force sensing and advanced data analytics. Surgeons like Douglas Stoddard are using features like telepresence and Case Insights to review procedures, quantify surgical movements, and collaborate globally, moving surgery from an art to a more data-driven science. This technological leap aims to reduce variability in surgical outcomes, broaden access to surgical expertise, and accelerate discovery in the field.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Lowers Price Target for Parker Hannifin (PH) to $980
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Joseph O'Dea maintained an "Overweight" rating for Parker Hannifin (PH) but lowered the price target from $1050 to $980. This adjustment represents a 6.67% decrease. Despite the lower price target from Wells Fargo, the average target price from 22 analysts for PH is $1,027.20, implying an 11.11% upside from its current price, and the consensus recommendation from 27 brokerage firms indicates an "Outperform" status.

feed.title: Oracle Data Center Nears $16 Billion Financing After Twisty Path
feed.summary: Related Digital is nearing finalization of $16 billion in financing for a large Oracle data center in Michigan. This financing follows several months of complex negotiations with investors. This new Oracle data center, once built, will power applications for OpenAI and adds to other massive debt packages arranged for Oracle data centers in Texas, Wisconsin, and New Mexico.

feed.title: EXPE: Wells Fargo Maintains Expedia Group Rating, Lowers Price T
feed.summary: Wells Fargo maintained its Equal-Weight rating on Expedia Group (EXPE) but lowered its price target from $315 to $311. This adjustment represents a 1.27% decrease from the previous target. Other recent analyst actions on EXPE include upgrades and price target revisions from Jefferies, Morgan Stanley, BTIG, Mizuho, and Citizens, reflecting a varied outlook on the stock.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Lowers Price Target for Eversource Energy (ES) to $74
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for Eversource Energy (ES) to $74 from $78, while maintaining an "Overweight" rating. This adjustment comes amidst similar revisions from other analyst firms, including B of A Securities, UBS, and Mizuho, reflecting a broad re-evaluation of the company's future potential. Eversource Energy, a utility company serving over 4 million customers in the Northeast US, has an average analyst target price of $73.59, implying a 6.00% upside from its current price.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target for Rockwell Automation (ROK) t
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Joseph O'Dea has lowered the price target for Rockwell Automation (ROK) from $410 to $360, while maintaining an 'Equal-Weight' rating. This adjustment reflects a 12.20% decrease in the price target. The article also provides historical analyst ratings for ROK and details about the company's operations and Wall Street forecasts.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern Advances Growth Strategy With New Short Line Partnership
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation has partnered with Jaguar Transport Holdings, LLC to enhance freight capacity and service in metro Atlanta. This collaboration involves Jaguar handling local switching, operating a transload terminal, and investing in infrastructure upgrades to boost freight volumes. The initiative aligns with Norfolk Southern's broader strategy to extend its network reach and improve local service through targeted partnerships, supporting its proposed combination with Union Pacific.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) CFO logs 401(k) share move, 2,081.74 credits
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity Company's EVP & CFO, Julie Marie Pelkowski, reported a participant-directed transaction within the company's 401(k) Plan, involving 2.679 shares of Class A common stock. Following this transaction, her direct holdings of Class A shares are 662.944. The filing also updated her Incentive Compensation Deferral Plan Share Credits to a total of 2,081.740 credits, which represent the right to receive an equivalent number of Class A shares upon her separation from the company.

feed.title: Ellucian Named a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Higher Education SaaS Student Information Systems for Second Consecutive Year
feed.summary: Ellucian has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Higher Education SaaS Student Information Systems for the second consecutive year. The company was positioned highest in Ability to Execute and furthest in Completeness of Vision, highlighting its strength in a student-first strategy and AI-powered innovation. Ellucian Student, designed for higher education, offers predictive analytics, embedded automation, and seamless integrations, serving over 2,600 institutions globally.

feed.title: Toy giant Hasbro hit by cyberattack that may take them 'several weeks' to recover from
feed.summary: Hasbro, the American toy-making giant, is currently battling an ongoing cyberattack that was detected on March 28th. The company has informed the SEC that it may take "several weeks" to fully resolve the incident, impacting its ability to conduct business, although they are implementing continuity plans. While some parts of its online presence are down, the specific nature of the attack, whether data was stolen, or if ransom demands were made, remains unclear.

feed.title: Dominion Energy Schedules Fourth-Quarter 2023 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Dominion Energy announced it will host its fourth-quarter 2023 earnings call on February 7, 2024. The call will discuss earnings and provide an update on business initiatives, including the Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind project. Investors can access the live webcast or a replay.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Initiates Coverage on Amcor (AMCR) with a Buy Rati
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has initiated coverage on Amcor (AMCR) with a Buy rating and a price target of $50.00, upgrading it from a prior Hold rating. This positive outlook is supported by recent analyst activities and highlights renewed confidence from major financial institutions in the company's market potential. Amcor, a global producer of plastic packaging, is forecast to have an average target price of $52.91 by analysts, implying a 31.24% upside from its current price, and boasts an "Outperform" status based on brokerage firm recommendations.

feed.title: Taser maker Axon lands nearly $7m in state tax credits
feed.summary: Taser maker Axon Enterprise Inc. has been awarded nearly $6.8 million in state tax credits by Massachusetts. This incentive comes with the promise of creating 450 new jobs at its Back Bay headquarters in Boston, potentially increasing its local workforce to 550 people. The company, which recently expanded its workforce by 24 percent globally in 2025, plans to use this assistance to further grow its presence in Boston.

feed.title: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: VRTX) reports 978-share Rule 144 resale and insider sales
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) has reported a Rule 144 notice for the planned resale of 978 shares of common stock stemming from a Restricted Stock Vesting event on February 17, 2025. The filing also details several insider sales by Joy Liu, who sold a total of 12,409 shares between January 5 and March 2, 2026, generating gross proceeds of over $6 million. These transactions are considered routine administrative disclosures and do not indicate changes to the company's capital structure.

feed.title: Why KLA Corporation (KLAC) Stock Is Trading Up Today
feed.summary: Shares of KLA Corporation (KLAC) rose 4.1% after the company announced a new $7 billion share repurchase program, increasing its total buyback capacity to nearly $11 billion. This move signals management's confidence in the company's financial health and future prospects. The stock's jump follows a recent drop due to geopolitical tensions threatening semiconductor supply chains.

feed.title: RTX's BBN Technologies launches open-source tool to validate covert cyber networks
feed.summary: RTX's BBN Technologies has released Maude-HCS, an open-source toolkit designed to help cyber defense teams model, test, and validate covert communication networks. This DARPA-funded tool provides rapid and reliable validation of hidden communication systems, which are crucial for internet freedom and national security in high-risk environments. Maude-HCS enhances cyber defense by offering rigorous guarantees on performance and privacy, accelerating validation processes from weeks to hours, and fostering open-source collaboration.

feed.title: ERIE executive (ERIE) updates 401(k) stock holding in Form 4
feed.summary: An executive at ERIE Indemnity Co. (ERIE), Anthony DaBreo, Senior Vice President of Life, reported a 401(k) transaction involving 2.846 shares of Class A Common Stock at $251.31 per share. Post-transaction, DaBreo now directly holds 1,364.553 shares. This Form 4 filing indicates a participant-directed transaction rather than an open-market trade.

feed.title: Stryker says operations a fully restored after March cyberattack
feed.summary: International healthcare product manufacturer Stryker announced that its operations are fully restored three weeks after a cyberattack disrupted its network on March 11. Production facilities are returning to peak capacity, and most product lines have healthy stock levels. The cyberattack, which was tied to Iran's Ministry of Intelligence and Security, affected several communication methods for employees and led some health systems to temporarily stop using Stryker products.

feed.title: Why Kroger (KR) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
feed.summary: Kroger's (KR) stock dropped 2.7% today after its former merger partner and competitor, Albertsons, announced store closures and layoffs, particularly in the competitive North Texas market. This news highlighted intense competitive pressures in the grocery sector, affecting investor sentiment towards Kroger despite its recent positive analyst ratings and strategic growth initiatives. Kroger's stock has performed well this year, up 11.8%, and is trading near its 52-week high.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Lowers Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) Price Target to $245.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has reduced its price target for Illinois Tool Works (NYSE:ITW) to $245.00 from $270.00, maintaining an "underweight" rating, which suggests a potential downside of 6.46%. While ITW slightly exceeded quarterly EPS and set optimistic FY2026 guidance, the stock has seen significant insider selling by senior executives. The consensus rating from other analysts is "Reduce" with an average target of $273.77, reflecting mixed sentiment among institutional investors.

feed.title: Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) Price Target Lowered to $90.00 at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company lowered its price target for Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) from $110.00 to $90.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating, suggesting a potential upside of 10.78%. This adjustment comes despite Ingersoll Rand beating its recent quarterly earnings expectations and setting optimistic FY2026 guidance. However, significant insider stock sales, totaling 584,771 shares worth approximately $55 million in the past three months, have reduced insider ownership to 0.68%, which could be a point of caution for investors.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Cuts Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB) Price Target to $530.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Hubbell (NYSE:HUBB) to $530 from $550, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment implies a potential upside of 5.6% for shareholders, aligning closely with the consensus analyst target of $533.50 and a "Moderate Buy" rating. The revision follows Hubbell's strong Q4 earnings, where it surpassed revenue and EPS estimates and provided positive FY2026 guidance, despite recent insider selling activity.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Has Lowered Expectations for Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) Stock Price
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has reduced its price target for Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) from $78 to $74, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment still implies a potential upside of approximately 6.8% from the current stock price. Other analysts have a "Hold" consensus rating for Eversource Energy with an average price target of $71.90, reflecting a mixed outlook from various firms. The company recently exceeded quarterly EPS and revenue estimates and provided FY2026 guidance largely in line with analyst expectations.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) Given New $980.00 Price Target at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has adjusted its price target for Parker-Hannifin (NYSE:PH) shares from $1,050.00 to $980.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. Despite the lowered target from Wells Fargo, the industrial products company holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with a collective target price of $996.60. The price target adjustment follows Parker-Hannifin's strong quarterly earnings report, which exceeded expectations with EPS of $7.65 against an anticipated $7.11 and a 9.1% revenue increase.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Lennox International (NYSE:LII) Stock Price
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Lennox International (NYSE:LII) from $560 to $480, maintaining an "equal weight" rating, despite a slight potential upside from the previous closing price. This follows Lennox International missing its Q4 2025 earnings expectations, reporting an EPS of $4.45 against an anticipated $4.76 and an 11.2% year-over-year revenue decrease. The company has, however, provided FY2026 EPS guidance of $23.50-$25.00, which is above analysts' projections.

feed.title: VisionWave Stock: Defense-Tech Opportunity or Risky Story?
feed.summary: VisionWave Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: VWAV) presents itself as a defense-tech company leveraging AI and autonomous systems, operating in a market with strong tailwinds. However, the company's muddled business model, reliance on acquisition-led growth, and lack of clear product differentiation raise concerns for investors. The stock's performance shows signs of structural selling, suggesting caution despite the appealing narrative.

feed.title: Venture lender TriplePoint paid $1.08 a share after double-digit loan yields
feed.summary: TriplePoint Venture Growth BDC Corp. (TPVG) announced its financial results for Q4 and FY 2025, reporting net investment income of $1.05 per share for the fiscal year and declaring a Q1 2026 distribution of $0.23 per share. The company funded $287.1 million in debt investments in 2025 with a 12.1% weighted average annualized portfolio yield at origination, and saw its net asset value increase to $8.73 per share. TPVG also strengthened its balance sheet by amending its Revolving Credit Facility and issuing senior unsecured notes to repay existing debt.

feed.title: Viasat, Globalstar, Pure Storage, Jabil, and Plexus Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Viasat, Globalstar, Pure Storage, Jabil, and Plexus jumped in the afternoon session due to positive investor sentiment driven by hopes of a potential ceasefire in Iran and easing oil prices. This optimism fueled a tech-led rally as Wall Street started the new quarter. The article highlights that this market movement reflects a 'risk-on' environment where investors are more willing to invest in growth-oriented assets.

feed.title: Philip Morris Stock Drops. Nicotine Pouches’ FDA Review Is Delayed, Report Says.
feed.summary: Philip Morris International's stock declined significantly Wednesday, making it one of the biggest decliners in the S&P 500. This drop followed a report indicating a delay in the Food and Drug Administration's fast-track review process for certain nicotine pouches intended for sale in the U.S. Nicotine pouches are a key product for Philip Morris International, making the FDA's decision crucial.

feed.title: Modest gain for AgEagle Aerial Systems stock as sellers maintain technical pressure
feed.summary: AgEagle Aerial Systems (UAVS) stock saw a modest 0.75% gain but remains under significant technical selling pressure, trading below all key moving averages. The company reported growth in its defense and government segment for FY2025 and strategic investments, aiming for a stronger capital position in 2026. However, market sentiment and momentum indicators suggest continued weakness, with analysts not expecting a reversal until the stock closes above $1.05.

feed.title: BKV, Permian Resources, Range Resources, APA Corporation, and Viper Energy Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of BKV, Permian Resources, Range Resources, APA Corporation, and Viper Energy fell after signals of de-escalation in the U.S.-Iran conflict caused oil prices to drop. This removed a key support for the energy sector, leading to a decline in West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude oil prices. The market reaction presents potential buying opportunities for high-quality stocks in the sector.

feed.title: Chord Energy, Murphy Oil, Crescent Energy, Diamondback Energy, and Devon Energy Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Chord Energy, Murphy Oil, Crescent Energy, Diamondback Energy, and Devon Energy fell in afternoon trading due to a drop in oil prices. This decline was triggered by signals of de-escalation in the U.S.-Iran conflict, leading to the unwinding of the "war premium" on oil. West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude oil fell by about 2%, impacting energy stocks as traders also took profits.

feed.title: Matador Resources, SM Energy, Northern Oil and Gas, ProFrac, and Coterra Energy Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Several energy stocks including Matador Resources, SM Energy, Northern Oil and Gas, ProFrac, and Coterra Energy experienced declines in the afternoon trading session. This drop was attributed to a fall in oil prices, triggered by signals of de-escalation in the U.S.-Iran conflict, which removed a key support for the energy sector. West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude oil fell by about 2% to below $101 a barrel, also influenced by profit-taking after a strong run in energy stocks.

feed.title: EOG Resources Inc (EOG) Trading Down 3.04% on Apr 1
feed.summary: EOG Resources Inc (EOG) shares fell 3.04% in mid-day trading on April 1, reaching an intraday low of $138.89 before closing at $140.18. Wall Street analysts have an average target price of $144.27, suggesting a 2.92% upside, with a consensus "Outperform" rating. However, GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $132.93, indicating a potential 5.17% downside.

feed.title: FactSet Research Systems (FDS) Target Price Raised by Wells Farg
feed.summary: Wells Fargo maintained its "Underweight" rating on FactSet Research Systems (FDS) but increased the price target from $195.00 to $200.00 USD. This update reflects a 2.56% increase in the target price. The article also provides a historical overview of analyst ratings for FDS from various firms and presents the average target price from 17 analysts, indicating a potential upside from the current price.

feed.title: SLB and Rockwell Automation Complete Sensia Joint Venture Dissolution
feed.summary: SLB and Rockwell Automation have completed the dissolution of their Sensia joint venture. SLB will now own the Lift Control, Measurement, Digital Solutions, and Edge Application businesses, while Rockwell Automation takes over the Process Automation & vMonitor products business. Both companies are committed to ensuring a smooth transition and continued service excellence for customers.

feed.title: Unity Bancorp Stands Out From The Small-Cap Crowd (NASDAQ:UNTY)
feed.summary: Unity Bancorp (UNTY) is rated Buy ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings, despite sector-wide weakness, due to strong company fundamentals including nearly 40% EPS growth in FY 2025 and robust operational metrics. While non-accrual assets doubled due to one commercial mortgage, management anticipates minimal loss. The company also demonstrates strong capital return discipline with 12 consecutive years of dividend increases, including a recent 25% hike.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Western Digital (WDC) surged 11.3% after an analyst at Bernstein upgraded the stock to Outperform, citing strong demand for AI-driven data center storage and improved fundamentals. The upgrade comes despite geopolitical tensions in Iran having recently caused a dip in the stock due to potential supply chain disruptions for semiconductor manufacturing. Western Digital has seen a 58.5% increase since the start of the year and is trading near its 52-week high.

feed.title: Why Is Corning (GLW) Stock Soaring Today
feed.summary: Corning's (GLW) stock jumped 5.4% following news of a major optical cable plant expansion for AI data centers, backed by a multiyear supply deal with Meta worth up to $6 billion. This agreement, along with a recent earnings beat and analyst price target increases, has boosted investor confidence in Corning's role in the generative AI boom. Despite recent volatility, the market views this development as meaningful for the company.

feed.title: Tennant Company (TNC) Scrutinized Amid Surprise Functionality Issues in North America Enterprise Resource Planning, Stock Tanks 23% -- Hagens Berman
feed.summary: Hagens Berman is investigating Tennant Company (TNC) after its stock dropped 23% following the revelation of severe functionality issues with its new Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system in North America. The company reported a significant decrease in GAAP net income for 2025 and a net loss in Q4 2025, attributing the problems to the ERP system which hindered order entry, product shipping, and customer service. The firm is examining whether Tennant concealed crucial information from investors regarding the ERP system's progress and challenges.

feed.title: MCO (NYSE) Form 144: Richard Steele reports sale of 375 shares
feed.summary: A Form 144 filing indicates Richard Steele sold 375 shares of Moody's Corp (MCO) common stock, yielding proceeds of $171,266.25. The sale, dated March 3, 2026, was connected to a Restricted Stock Vesting event on March 1, 2026, and processed by Fidelity Brokerage Services LLC. This is considered a routine compliance filing for an affiliate sale of vested restricted stock.
